title: TypeScript CSV escaping helper
description: Add RFC 4180 quote escaping to a CSV utility.

prompt.userRequest: Implement escapeCsv so values containing commas, quotes, or newlines are quoted and internal quotes are doubled.
prompt.publicContext: Plain values without special characters should not be quoted.

referenceSolutionNotes: The reference solution checks for comma, quote, CR, or LF and returns a quoted value with value.replaceAll('"', '""').
negativeControlWrongSolution: A wrong solution wraps every value in quotes but does not double embedded quotes.
